slides.title: 1g per *pound*
slides.body: Per pound of goal bodyweight. Simple.

slides.title: Hit it *every meal*
slides.body: Around 30 to 40g per meal absorbs best.

slides.title: Log it for a *week*
slides.body: You're eating less than you think.

slides.title: Hit your *protein*.
slides.body: Snap a meal and Vibe Health counts the protein for you.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store
